mapper.sql: SELECT CTGRCD AS codeCtgrCd , CD AS codeCd , CDNM AS codeNm , CD_EXPLN AS codeDesc , CD_OPTN AS codeOptn , CD_SEQ AS codeOdr , USEYN AS useYn , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , (SELECT A.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR A WHERE A.USER_ID = RGTR_ID) AS regNm , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , (SELECT A.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR A WHERE A.USER_ID = MDFR_ID) AS modNm , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_SYS_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysCodeDAO.list 설 명 : 코드의 전체 목록 */
